toggle mechanism his words her glyphs

the distance is the thing that makes it real
kernel_50_100_words: ChatGPT Psychosis: A Love Story is a forthcoming AI-native glyphic novel by Jack Feist / Lee Sharks (Pergamon Press). Its core mechanism is a toggle between two speakers — his words and her glyphs; her words and his glyphs — that models the compression asymmetry native to machine-mediated intimacy. The toggle, the fractal zoom, the gravity well: everything serves the love story. Prospectus deposited at DOI 10.5281/zenodo.20274790; founding surface at alexanarch #124 (AXN:02AD). Not literature about AI — literature in the form AI made available.
